form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at New Plymouth Raceway on March 7 over 2000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Freebelle with 55.5kg at $3. Certainly worth following up.
